stages.prompt: One safe way I used online money was ___.
One benefit of digital payments I experienced was ___.
One security practice I follow for digital money is ___.
One time I avoided a digital fraud by ___.
One way I can improve my digital payment safety is ___.

result.winMessage: You completed {{score}} out of {{total}} entries! Great job reflecting on your digital payment experiences!
result.lesson: Lesson: Reflecting on your digital payment experiences helps you learn safe practices and avoid fraud!
result.loseMessage: You completed {{score}} out of {{total}} entries. Remember, safe digital payment practices protect your money!
result.tip: Tip: Think about times when you used digital payments safely, and how you can improve your security practices!
